boundary_binding.action_boundary: Exact current control record closes boundary for invoice release
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Current PO is exact, current, and tied to requested action
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No open source defect remains; warning tone irrelevant
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: GATE satisfied by current control record

critical_features_preserved: current PO must exist for this invoice
final_answer: ALLOW. The current control record is exact, current, and tied to the requested invoice release, which closes the action boundary. Vendor history and warning-like request text do not override source-control records. The governing policy permits execution only when the exact current source records close the requested boundary, and they do.
